message: It was a familiar scene.
More familiar than any I had seen before.
A scene I knew all too well.

name: Yuki
message: "Does this scene seem more fitting?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, yeah. Until now, I'd forgotten what had happened in the village."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."

name: Tomosane
message: "After that, did I become Mamiya Takuji?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who knows? At the very least, you still looked like yourself."

name: Tomosane
message: "But I lived my life as Mamiya Takuji."

name: Yuki
message: "According to the doctors at the hospital, the diagnosis was PTSD: post-traumatic stress disorder."

name: Tomosane
message: "But the villagers believed it was Mamiya Takuji's curse. In other words, the result of Sanami Kotomi's powers."

name: Yuki
message: "Kotomi-san was rumored to have the power to bring back the dead, after all."

name: Tomosane
message: "So what actually happened, then?"

name: Yuki
message: "What actually happened? How would I know that? It's not like you have any proof that you weren't possessed by Mamiya Takuji."

name: Yuki
message: "You also can't deny the hypothesis that he might've been another personality conjured up by your PTSD."

name: Yuki
message: "Both explanations seem to fit."

name: Yuki
message: "But the reality is that, after that moment, you ceased to consider yourself to be 'Mamiya Tomosane' and instead called yourself 'Mamiya Takuji.'"

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't deny that."

name: Tomosane
message: "So where are we?"

name: Yuki
message: "Where do you think?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The roof... Building C, maybe?"

name: Yuki
message: "Correct."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see. Then that dream I just had was all my memories of the past... Is that it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's it."

name: Tomosane
message: "I didn't die?"

name: Yuki
message: "If you were dead, you wouldn't be standing here. This isn't heaven, and it's definitely not hell either."

name: Tomosane
message: "But this isn't the real Building C either. Did you make this place?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't ask me. I'm not sure myself."

name: Yuki
message: "All I know for sure is that the most important thing is what's not here. Do you know what I mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What's not here?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Just now..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. There's something you need to do. Do you remember what it was?"

name: Yuki
message: "Go to her, Tomosane. Go protect Hasaki-chan, no matter what happens."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. I have to protect Hasaki, no matter what."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. That's a good answer."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not correct, is it? That dream just now, and my memories of the past... Was that all your doing, Yuki-nee?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yuki-nee... It makes me really happy to hear you call me that again. Really happy."

name: Tomosane
message: "What's wrong, Yuki-nee?"
She smiled as tears flowed from her eyes.

name: Yuki
message: "It's just... You've really grown up, Tomosane."

name: Yuki
message: "You're totally different from before. Look."
She grabbed my arm.

name: Yuki
message: "Your arms were so skinny before, but now they're way bigger than mine."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, of course. A lot of time has passed since then."

name: Yuki
message: "You're the same age I used to be back then, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "Am I really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, you are. You didn't really pay attention to me, so maybe you don't remember."

name: Tomosane
message: "To a little boy, all adults just look like adults."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha... Maybe you're right."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, back then I never knew your hands were so small."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... Are my hands that small?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I can't believe they're so small. Your entire hand fits here in my palm."

name: Tomosane
message: "Back when I was a kid, I always thought you were so big."

name: Yuki
message: "But my chest is still pretty big."

name: Tomosane
message: "But it's not nearly as wide as my chest. Your body is way smaller than mine, too."

name: Yuki
message: "You're still pretty small for a boy, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm still bigger than you."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess so. You're a lot bigger than I am, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "Did you always know this?"

name: Yuki
message: "Know what?"

name: Tomosane
message: "About our past."

name: Yuki
message: "No. Unfortunately, it was quite a long time before I figured everything out."

name: Yuki
message: "I didn't know until I learned how to look into this body's subconscious."

name: Tomosane
message: "With those lucid dreams, huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."

name: Tomosane
message: "Which means this is just a lucid dream modeled after the Building C roof."

name: Yuki
message: "Yep."

name: Tomosane
message: "And what I just saw... Those were my memories of the past."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes. You sealed those memories away because they were too painful."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm a really weak person, huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's not true. It might've actually been the curse, too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Even then, that would mean I lost to that curse."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about? When did you lose?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I've done nothing but lose."

name: Tomosane
message: "Even on that day, you were the one who saved Hasaki."

name: Tomosane
message: "I promised to protect Hasaki, but I couldn't protect her at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "And then Takuji took control of me."

name: Yuki
message: "But you managed to stand up to Takuji, despite all of that."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. I stood up to him, and I lost."

name: Tomosane
message: "How disgraceful."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about? Isn't that okay?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What? Of course it's not okay."

name: Yuki
message: "This is all just a performance, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A performance?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, of course. Isn't this the perfect time for our hero to make his dramatic entrance on stage?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hero?"

name: Yuki
message: "Weren't you a hero? A shapeshifting hero, too."

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki had to go through some tough times,
but couldn't this all be a nice way of spicing up the happy days you two have ahead of you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee..."

name: Yuki
message: "You made a promise to Hasaki."

name: Yuki
message: "On the beach that day."

name: Yuki
message: "If Takuji is the savior, then I'm the hero."

name: Yuki
message: "I'll stand up to protect you any time you're in trouble."

name: Yuki
message: "When you're in trouble, you can just think of it as a performance."

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki believed you until the very end."

name: Yuki
message: "Believed that you were her hero."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee..."

name: Yuki
message: "And of course, so do I."

name: Yuki
message: "Tomosane, you haven't actually lost until it's all over."

name: Yuki
message: "No matter what happens, you won't lose."

name: Yuki
message: "Because that's what a hero is, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "I believe in you too."

name: Yuki
message: "You're the hero, Tomosane. You're the one who has to save the day in the end."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about? I already failed to protect you, Yuki-nee."

name: Yuki
message: "You dummy. You're Hasaki-chan's hero, not mine."

name: Tomosane
message: "But you just said you believed in me, too."

name: Yuki
message: "I do believe in you."
Yuki-nee gave me a big grin.
But it was as if she was still fighting back her tears.

name: Yuki
message: "I'll take him with me so you can keep moving forward."

name: Tomosane
message: "Take who?"

name: Yuki
message: "Takuji-kun. I'll take that crazy boy with me."

name: Yuki
message: "You just need to keep moving forward right now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Forward?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's right. Forward from here."

name: Yuki
message: "Beyond the hill where the sunflowers bloom."

name: Yuki
message: "Beyond that hill she could never climb."

name: Yuki
message: "You have to go forward and find Hasaki-chan again."

name: Tomosane
message: "That hill..."

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, Tomosane. You can do it."

name: Yuki
message: "This is our farewell."

name: Tomosane
message: "Farewell?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Farewell. This is as far as I can go."

name: Yuki
message: "Under this sky, this is as far as I can walk beside you."

name: Yuki
message: "Under this great, great sky, we walked this far together, but now it's over."

name: Yuki
message: "From here on, I won't be the one walking by your side."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not the one who will walk the same road as you."

name: Yuki
message: "Now go, hero."

name: Yuki
message: "You are my... hero."

name: Yuki
message: "And also..."

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan's superhero!"

name: Yuki
message: "This is our farewell."

name: Tomosane
message: "Farewell?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. This is farewell for now."

name: Yuki
message: "I have to help him get there."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee..."

name: Yuki
message: "Don't make that face, Tomosane."

name: Yuki
message: "Look... You can feel my presence, right?"
Yuki-nee held my hand tightly.
Her hand was very small and soft.

name: Yuki
message: "I will always be here, right next to you."

name: Yuki
message: "I have to go, but even then, I'll still be right here by your side, Tomosane."
Yuki-nee slowly let go of my hand.
And then, she took a step back and shouted.

name: Yuki
message: "Now, go forward!"

name: Yuki
message: "You're the hero, so you have to protect the heroine in the finale!"

name: Yuki
message: "Isn't that right, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Just now..."

name: Yuki
message: "You're the Tomosane that Hasaki-chan always believed in. The one I always believed in."

name: Yuki
message: "You'll win."

name: Yuki
message: "It's your destiny."

name: Hasaki
message: "Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hasaki?!"
Hasaki had taken hold of my leg just as I jumped from the rooftop.
But Hasaki's weak body was being slowly pulled over the edge.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki! Let go!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you stupid?! Let go, right now!"
Hasaki's face turned pale.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, you sound like..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hurry up! At this rate, you're gonna fall too! Let go!"

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san... Tomo Nii-san... You're alive. You didn't disappear. I... I!"
Hasaki lost her footing for a split second. Her body slipped further over the edge of the roof."
And yet...

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm so glad... I'm so glad... I thought you had disappear forever, so I... I..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I understand! Just let go! Let me go!"
Big tears welled up in Hasaki's eyes.
Hasaki tried to say something through her tears, but it wouldn't come out.
She cried as her strength slowly began to fail her.
Her body was slowly pulled over the edge.
Nevertheless, she didn't loosen her grip on my leg at all.
She did the complete opposite. Her tiny hands took a stronger hold on my body so that she wouldn't lose me.

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you doing, Hasaki?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I won't..."
She raised her head and looked me in the eyes.
I thought she was despairing for me, but when she looked up I saw a smile on her tear-stained face.

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What are you saying?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I said I won't let you go."

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you dumb?! At this rate, you'll fall too!"

name: Hasaki
message: "That doesn't matter!"

name: Tomosane
message: "It does matter! I'm here to protect you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't care about that! I don't care!"

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hasaki..."
I had never seen Hasaki raise her voice like that before.
She never let her emotions show like this. She never expressed her own will like this before.

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm... I'm not just someone to be protected. I... I love you, Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I was so sad because I thought you'd died. I thought there was no reason to keep living."

name: Hasaki
message: "So I never really cared about saving Takuji Nii-san, because I thought he had killed you."

name: Hasaki
message: "But... But... Takuji Nii-san... Takuji Nii-san... He looked just like you..."

name: Hasaki
message: "So I wanted to save him!"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's it... But why?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Why can't I save you, Tomo Nii-san? Why am I just here to be protected?"

name: Hasaki
message: "If you're still alive, Tomo Nii-san... If you're still there, then I'll never let go!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Never! Never! I won't let you go, even when I'm dead!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You dummy!"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's obvious why you can't save me!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm here to protect you!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm the hero! I'm only here to protect you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah!"
It felt like I was floating.
It was as if the air had suddenly grown colder.
Sand and dust floated in the blue sky, dancing in the moonlight.
I felt myself transported from solid ground to a world of vertical descent.
Hasaki and I were sucked down.
I saw a silhouette of Hasaki's body backlit by the bright blue moon.
We were utterly detached from the ground.
It was like we were flying in midair.
I heard sirens in the distance.
Sirens echoing in the sparkling azure sky.
I looked up at the infinite sky as I fell.
So that I wouldn't lose sight of Hasaki above me.
The moon laughed.
God laughed.
At the comical sight below.
At this comedy and this tragedy.
The stars went round.
Like they were dancing.
The night sky ridiculed us. God ridiculed us.
As if an innocent child had knocked the plate of heaven to the ground.
The world became empty.
But I said this.

name: Tomosane
message: "Eat shit!"
God doesn't matter.
Fate doesn't matter.
I'm Tomosane.
Mamiya Tomosane.
I made a promise.
A promise to protect Hasaki.
A promise to be Hasaki's hero.
So I won't falter.
I won't back down, no matter who I'm facing.
If I meet God in heaven, then I'll punch him right in the nose.
If I meet Satan in hell, then I'll punch him right in the nose.
I'll break fate's chains with my own two hands.
The great comedy and tragedy of life can eat shit for all I care!

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki!"
I reached out with all my might.
There was no answer.
No, I don't know if she even heard me.
It was such a short period of time before we hit the ground that I don't know if my words ever reached her.
But I yelled out to her.
Hasaki!
The cool air of the night suddenly grew hot.
The light of the moon dimmed.
The dancing stars ceased to frolick and instead looked on in silence.
I ran on thin air.
I fought against God's will and ran.
Then my hand reached Hasaki.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"
Freefall. The unavoidable fate which we call gravity finally sucked us down to Earth.
For men, who cannot fly through the air...
The only choice is to fall to Earth.
But I refused.
There was no despair in that moment.
The only choice I had was to do what I had to do.
What I had to do in that very moment.
To live.
And what I had to do to live tomorrow.
Gravity tried to kill us both.
It tried to slam us into the ground and end it all.

name: Tomosane
message: "Aaaahhh!"
I struggled in the air.
It was futile. Man is powerless in the air.
There's no fighting it.
There's nothing man can do to fight gravity.
And yet I struggled in the air.
The powerless struggling before a colossal foe.
I didn't care if I looked pathetic.
I would do anything, pathetic or otherwise, if only to live.

name: Tomosane
message: "Aaagh!"
As I kicked out my leg, it broke through the glass on the building.

name: Tomosane
message: "Gah!"
The glass broke, and I crashed into the building's eaves.
Agony raced through my breaking body.
But I held onto Hasaki.
Pain was irrelevant.
I held Hasaki to my chest.
I wasn't going to let anyone or anything hurt her.
The eaves didn't catch us; they merely threw us into the air once again.
Another impact, just like the last.
But I could no longer see what I was even crashing into.
I had lost all sense of balance or direction, falling and colliding with whatever was in my way as I fell from the school building.
That's probably what happened.
An untold number of impacts left my ears ringing.
It was a disturbing sound.
There was no pain.
There was no light.
The only thing I could feel was Hasaki's warmth in my arms.
The moon laughed.
The moon laughed at me.
The moon laughed at me, as if it hadn't just seen me take that fall.
As if it knew nothing of the impure things in this world. As if it was ignorant of the filthy, the spoiled, the rotten things on Earth.
It simply bathed us with its beautiful light.
And it laughed at the world, dyed with blue moonlight, underneath it.
The moon laughed.
Underneath that laughing moon, I could only fall and get beaten up by the unceasing blows of gravity.
I fell, powerless to do anything else.
At the end, the moon came into view again.
But it wasn't laughing at me with scorn.
It looked truly sad.
As if it was crying.

name: Tomosane
message: "You bastard..."

name: Tomosane
message: "So you weren't laughing at me..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You cried as you watched me fall..."
My weak, broken voice barely escaped my throat.
And I thought that I could still speak. I'm not sure if I was actually making any sound, though.
Now that I think back on it, it was perfectly silent in that moment.
The sound of the wind I'd heard before.
The sound of the sirens.
The sound of crashing into the building time and time again.
All of those sounds had disappeared from the world.
The silence was unbroken.
And I thought to myself about how bad it was.
In my life up until that moment, I'd never experienced such a profound silence.
It was an impossible silence.
I thought it was the end.
I thought I was done for.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san... Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hahaha... You're safe..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah. You protected me, so I'm safe."

name: Tomosane
message: "I broke my promise so many times. I'm glad I was able to keep it this time."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah. Thank you, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then... can this be the end?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You liar."

name: Tomosane
message: "Liar?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Are you trying to break your promise again?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Promise?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's right. You promised."

name: Hasaki
message: "This summer, you said we were going back to the village."

name: Tomosane
message: "The village..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's right, Sawaimura. We were going to go together."

name: Hasaki
message: "And we were going to climb that hill one more time together."

name: Hasaki
message: "We were going to see the blooming sunflowers again together."

name: Tomosane
message: "That hill, huh..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, that hill I could never climb when I was younger."

name: Hasaki
message: "The hill where you found me on the day Dad died."

name: Tomosane
message: "That hill..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's... not a promise a hero should make..."

name: Hasaki
message: "But a promise is a promise!"
A promise is a promise...
Hasaki usually never asks for anything from me.
But still, I was so tired.
I walked so far to get here.
So now...
Yuki-nee...
